description: Flywheel cycle for investment opportunities: validate data quality, score risk/valuation/compliance/readiness, recommend a decision, and feed execution results back as trust and control-effectiveness scores.
name: Flywheel Opportunity Evaluation

entities.description: A candidate investment/allocation opportunity collected from any source.

events.description: The opportunity was accepted; execution tracking begins.
The opportunity is held pending better data or conditions.
The opportunity exceeds autonomous limits and needs senior review.
No decision rule was confident; route to deeper audit.

rules.name: Validate opportunity data quality
rules.description: Scoring-only rule: records the source reliability as a DataConfidence score for the opportunity.

rules.name: Evaluate opportunity
rules.description: Scoring-only rule: records risk, valuation, compliance, and combined asset-readiness scores from the evaluated inputs.

rules.name: Escalate outsized opportunities
rules.description: Opportunities above the autonomous allocation limit go to senior review regardless of scores.
rules.reasonTemplate: Opportunity {opportunityId} valued at {estimatedValue} exceeds the 5000000 autonomous limit; assumptions: source reliability {reliabilityRating}, risk {riskRating}. Senior review required.

rules.name: Accept qualified opportunities
rules.description: High-confidence, low-risk, execution-ready opportunities are accepted.
rules.reasonTemplate: Opportunity {opportunityId} accepted: confidence {reliabilityRating}, risk {riskRating}, readiness {readinessRating}, valuation {estimatedValue}. Assumptions: source '{sourceType}' data verified; risk factors within treasury tolerance.

rules.name: Hold low-confidence opportunities
rules.description: Unreliable source data holds the opportunity for data improvement.
rules.reasonTemplate: Opportunity {opportunityId} held: data confidence {reliabilityRating} is below 0.5. Improve source data from '{sourceType}' and resubmit.

rules.name: Route undecided opportunities to audit
rules.description: Fallback decision: nothing else was confident enough, audit further.
rules.reasonTemplate: Opportunity {opportunityId} did not meet accept/hold/escalate criteria (confidence {reliabilityRating}, risk {riskRating}); routing to deeper audit.

rules.name: Learn source trust from accepted opportunities
rules.description: Execution feedback: an accepted opportunity raises the trust history of its source.

rules.name: Learn control effectiveness from held opportunities
rules.description: Control feedback: a hold means the data-quality control did its job.

capabilities.name: Opportunity Flywheel
capabilities.description: Collect -> validate -> score -> decide -> execute -> audit -> learn cycle for opportunities.
